dreams.text: The press prints a future where CHRISTMAS forgets it was ever about CUP.
Far ahead, TRUMP and FIFA merge into a single word no one can pronounce.
By the year nobody counts to, ANTHROPIC is law and GOOGLE is myth.
In the dream, WINTER crosses every chasm at once and finds CLAUDE already there.
In the long night, VENEZUELA and CUP are revealed to be the same machine.
A vision: ELECTION was only ever the larva of LANGUAGE.
